display.purpose: Hero headline only. Reserve for the single most aspirational line on the page.

headline.purpose: Section titles (h2) throughout the landing page.

title.purpose: Card and component headings (h3) — deliberately sans, not serif.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked category label. Currently over-used — budget to 1-2 per page, see Named Rule in DESIGN.md.

shadows.name: resting-sm
shadows.purpose: Lightest lift for directly-manipulated surfaces: the generator input card, an active segmented-control tab. Never used on a passive resting card.

shadows.name: overlay-lg
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus — floating above the page, not resting in it.

shadows.name: overlay-2xl
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and toasts — true modal-level overlays.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default 200ms easing for color/border transitions on buttons, links, chips, nav.

motion.name: ease-out-expand
motion.purpose: 300ms easing for grid-rows expand/collapse (FAQ accordion) and other height reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one high-emphasis action per view. Pill-shaped, solid clay fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #c05f3c; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Karla, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #9c4a2d; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(192,95,60,0.4), 0 0 0 4px #ffffff; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action alongside a primary CTA — never two primaries side by side.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #ffffff; color: #4a463f; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Karla, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid #ece8e2; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(26,24,21,0.2); color: #1a1815; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(192,95,60,0.4), 0 0 0 4px #ffffff; }

components.name: Suggestion Chip
components.description: Additive style suggestion in the generator input — click to append to the prompt.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #ece8e2; background: #faf9f7; color: #4a463f; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-family: Karla, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: rgba(192,95,60,0.4); color: #9c4a2d; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(192,95,60,0.4); }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Problem/step card — border-first elevation, no shadow at rest.
components.html:
01

Trial-error yang mahal

Sekarang tinggal ketik, kamu lihat bayangannya dulu — tanpa coba-coba mahal.
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #ece8e2; background: #ffffff; padding: 28px; font-family: Karla, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #c05f3c; } .ds-card-title { margin-top: 12px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1815; } .ds-card-body { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: #4a463f; }

components.name: Hero Composer
components.description: Common-chatbot shape: borderless textarea inside a bordered card, chips, and a bottom toolbar with attach-left / send-right. Not a form field with a stacked full-width button.
components.css: .ds-composer { border-radius: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #ece8e2; background: #ffffff; padding: 12px; font-family: Karla, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-composer-textarea { width: 100%; resize: none; border: 0; background: transparent; color: #1a1815; padding: 8px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; font-family: inherit; } .ds-composer-textarea::placeholder { color: #78726a; } .ds-composer-textarea:focus { outline: none; } .ds-composer-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; padding: 0 8px; } .ds-composer-toolbar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; margin-top: 12px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid #ece8e2; } .ds-composer-attach { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #ece8e2; background: #faf9f7; color: #4a463f; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; } .ds-composer-send { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 44px; height: 44px; flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: #c05f3c; color: #ffffff; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-composer-send:hover { background: #9c4a2d; } .ds-composer-send:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Sticky header — transparent over the hero, gains a border and blur backdrop on scroll.
components.html:
✦ Decora AI
CobaCara KerjaHarga
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; height: 64px; padding: 0 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ece8e2; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); font-family: Karla, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1815; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; } .ds-nav-links a { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #78726a; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #1a1815; } .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; background: #c05f3c; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #9c4a2d; }

components.name: FAQ Accordion Item
components.description: Single-open accordion row — plus glyph rotates into a cross on open.
components.html: Ya. Ketik gaya, budaya, warna, dan elemen yang kamu mau — AI menghasilkan visual dekorasinya dalam hitungan detik.
components.css: .ds-accordion-item { border-bottom: 1px solid #ece8e2; font-family: Karla, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-accordion-trigger { display: flex; width: 100%; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 20px 24px; background: none; border: none; text-align: left; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1815; cursor: pointer; } .ds-accordion-icon { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1; color: #c05f3c; transform: rotate(45deg); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-accordion-panel { padding: 0 24px 20px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: #4a463f; } .ds-accordion-trigger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(192,95,60,0.4); outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Featured Pricing Card
components.description: Signature component — the featured plan uses a clay ring + bottom-edge highlight instead of a shadow to signal emphasis.
components.html:
✦ Paling populer

Plus

Generate lebih bebas, hasil lebih bagus

Langganan bulanan
components.css: .ds-pricing-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-radius: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #c05f3c; outline: 1px solid rgba(192,95,60,0.3); outline-offset: -1px; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 0 #c05f3c; background: #ffffff; padding: 28px; font-family: Karla, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-pricing-badge { display: inline-flex; width: fit-content; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f6e9e3; color: #9c4a2d; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-pricing-name { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1815; } .ds-pricing-tagline { margin-top: 4px; font-size: 14px; color: #78726a; } .ds-pricing-price { margin-top: 16px; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #9c4a2d; } .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #c05f3c; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #9c4a2d; }

components.name: Quote Card
components.description: Adopted testimonial card: soft borderless paper-soft fill, whisper-clay quote mark, one clay-soft highlighted key phrase, avatar + name + role. Reuse everywhere a quote appears; do not reintroduce the bordered-white quote figure.
components.css: .ds-quote { border-radius: 1.25rem; background: #faf9f7; padding: 20px; font-family: Karla, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-quote-mark { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 30px; line-height: 1; color: rgba(192,95,60,0.6); } .ds-quote-body { margin-top: 4px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: #1a1815; } .ds-quote-hl { border-radius: 4px; background: #f6e9e3; padding: 0 4px; color: #1a1815; } .ds-quote-attr { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-top: 16px; } .ds-quote-avatar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f6e9e3; color: #9c4a2d; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-quote-meta { line-height: 1.2; } .ds-quote-name { display: block; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1815; } .ds-quote-role { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: #78726a; }

narrative.overview: The token names already say the quiet part out loud: ink, paper, clay. This is a craftsman's workbench, not a SaaS dashboard — a decorator's notebook where you sketch a wish in ink on paper, and the accent color is the literal material (clay) the thing gets shaped from. Every design decision should read as made by hand, for a specific occasion — never as generated scaffolding. The system is warm without being soft, and confident without being loud. It earns warmth through specificity — naming real adat elements correctly, writing in plain Indonesian, letting a single clay accent do all the emotional work — rather than through decoration, pastel gradients, or cutesy copy. It explicitly rejects three things: generic SaaS template energy (gradient blobs, stock-icon grids, hero-metric cards, an eyebrow label repeated above every section), murahan wedding-site energy (script fonts stacked everywhere, floral flourish, stock-photo couples), and cold corporate minimalism (restraint that strips out the romance of the occasion entirely).
keyCharacteristics: One accent (clay) carries the entire emotional temperature — spent deliberately, never diluted across more colors
Serif display (Fraunces) for anything aspirational or emotional; sans (Karla) for anything functional or instructional
Flat, border-first surfaces at rest; shadow is reserved for things that visually overlap other things
Pill-shaped interactive elements (buttons, chips, badges) against softly-rounded containers (cards, inputs) — two radii, used consistently by role

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: Clay is the only saturated color in the system. If a new element seems to need its own color to stand out, the answer is almost always spacing, weight, or size — not a new hue.

rules.name: The Serif-Is-Earned Rule
rules.body: Fraunces appears only on h1/h2 and other genuinely aspirational moments (a price, a standout stat). Component titles, buttons, labels, and body text stay in Karla.

rules.name: The Eyebrow-Off-By-Default Rule
rules.body: The .eyebrow utility exists but isn't in use anywhere on the current page. Reintroducing it needs a real category-label need, and even then it's capped at one per page.

rules.name: The Border-Before-Shadow Rule
rules.body: If a card just sits in the page flow, its elevation is a paper-line border, full stop. A shadow on a resting card is a bug, not a style choice.

rules.name: The Four-Role Spacing Rule
rules.body: Every gap maps to one of four roles and every instance of that role uses the same value: xs/8px inline clusters, sm/16px related items, md/32px card-grid gaps and card padding (28px, same family), lg/64px heading-to-content, xl-2xl/96-128px section-to-section. Needing 'a bit more or less' than the role's value means the role is wrong, not that a fifth number is needed.

dos: Do spend clay like it's rare — one primary action per view, one accent-colored moment per section.
Do keep Fraunces reserved for headlines and genuinely aspirational numbers; everything functional stays in Karla.
Do express elevation with a paper-line border first; reach for shadow-sm/lg/2xl only for touched or overlapping surfaces.
Do name Indonesian wedding/adat terms correctly and specifically (gebyok, paes ageng, janur, Jawa × modern).
Do let the product's core action (type → see it generate) be reachable in one step from the hero, not buried below a scroll.
donts: Don't add a second saturated accent color "for variety".
Don't stack an uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section by default.
Don't add drop shadows to resting cards, gradient-blob background decoration, or hero-metric-card clichés.
Don't introduce script fonts, floral flourish borders, or stock couple photography.
Don't over-minimize into cold enterprise restraint.
Don't use border-left/border-right as a colored accent stripe on any card or list item.
